title: Pharmaceutical Attributes
description: Pharmaceutical-specific product attributes required by Venezuelan regulatory bodies (MPPS/SICM) and pharmacies. Mandatory in catalog items; included in orders where traceability is required. / Atributos farmacéuticos específicos requeridos por organismos reguladores venezolanos.

active_ingredient.description: INN (International Nonproprietary Name) of the active pharmaceutical ingredient. / DCI (Denominación Común Internacional) del ingrediente activo.

therapeutic_class.description: ATC (Anatomical Therapeutic Chemical) class or descriptive therapeutic category. / Clase ATC o categoría terapéutica descriptiva.

presentation.description: Commercial packaging presentation (units, container type). / Presentación comercial (unidades, tipo de envase).

requires_prescription.description: Whether this product requires a physician's prescription for dispensing. Propagates to POS systems to enforce prescription capture. / Indica si el producto requiere receta médica para dispensar. Se propaga a sistemas POS.

storage_conditions.description: Storage temperature requirement. Drives cold-chain logistics decisions. REFRIGERATED = 2–8°C, FROZEN = -20°C or below. / Requisito de temperatura de almacenamiento. Determina decisiones de cadena de frío.

concentration.description: Active ingredient concentration (amount and unit). / Concentración del ingrediente activo (cantidad y unidad).
